meaning: n.<西>节日(特指在西班牙和拉丁美洲以游行和舞蹈来庆祝的节日),祭典,圣日,假日
examples: Even though it's orange, we still call it Fiesta red.
The launch of the Fiesta in America was a test of the Farley strategy.
Cool balloon form 14th Philippine International Hot Air balloon Fiesta.
With mariachi bands providing the musical entertainment, the entire scene seems like one big fiesta.
The AppLink download for Fiesta owners went live today on the SYNC owner website, www.syncmyride.com.
